user.title: Konnessjoni BookStack

book.title: Agħżel ktieb mira
book.description: F'liema ktieb għandu jissinkronizza Home Assistant? Il-kontenut miżjud manwalment fuq il-paġni jinżamm.

reauth_confirm.title: Iġġedded it-token BookStack
reauth_confirm.description: BookStack irrifjuta t-token API għal {base_url}. Oħloq token ġdid f'BookStack u waħħal l-ID u s-sigriet hawn — l-URL u l-ktieb mira jibqgħu l-istess.

reconfigure.title: Aġġusta l-konnessjoni BookStack
reconfigure.description: Ibdel l-URL, it-token jew l-issettjar TLS ta' din il-konnessjoni. Il-ktieb mira u l-mappings tal-paġni kollha jinżammu. L-URL irid jindika lejn l-istess istanza BookStack ta' qabel.

error.auth: Token API rrifjutat jew permessi neqsin.
error.no_books: Ma nstab l-ebda ktieb f'din l-istanza BookStack. Oħloq ktieb mira l-ewwel.
error.unknown: Żball mhux mistenni — iċċekkja l-log ta' Home Assistant.
error.base_url_invalid_scheme: L-URL għandu jibda b'http:// jew https://.
error.base_url_missing_host: L-URL huwa inkomplet — l-isem tal-host nieqes.
error.path_invalid: Path must be absolute and the parent directory must already exist.
error.export_already_enabled_elsewhere: Markdown export is already enabled on another BookStack Sync instance. Only one instance per Home Assistant setup may export - otherwise the Markdown files collide. Disable the export on the other instance first.

abort.already_configured: Din l-istanza BookStack hija diġà kkonfigurata.
abort.reauth_successful: It-token ġie mġedded — il-konnessjoni BookStack ġiet irrestawrata.
abort.reconfigure_successful: Il-konnessjoni ġiet aġġornata — BookStack Sync ġie rrikonfigurat.
abort.url_mismatch: L-URL il-ġdid jindika lejn istanza BookStack oħra. Neħħi d-daħla oriġinali u żid waħda ġdida.

data_description.export_enabled: Off by default. When on, BookStack pages are written back as plain Markdown files for use as RAG / LLM input. Costs disk space and CPU on every export run, which is why it must be enabled consciously.
data_description.export_path: Where to write the Markdown files. Must be absolute and the parent directory must exist.

run_now.name: Sinkronizza issa
run_now.description: Tibda sinkronizzazzjoni minnufih mingħajr ma tistenna l-intervall.

force.name: Force overwrite tampered pages
force.description: When true, pages whose AUTO block looks tampered are overwritten instead of skipped. Use after a major upgrade. MANUAL block stays preserved.

preview.name: Anteprima ta' sinkronizzazzjoni
preview.description: Tirreġistra liema paġni jinħolqu/jiġu aġġornati mingħajr ma tikteb xejn f'BookStack.

force.name: Force overwrite tampered pages
force.description: Mirror of run_now's force flag. With preview, it shows what would be overwritten without actually committing.

export_markdown.name: Export Markdown (opt-in)
export_markdown.description: Exports every managed BookStack page as a plain Markdown file with YAML frontmatter, idempotent. Disabled by default - enable it in the integration's options first.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: Log what would be written without touching the filesystem.

output_path.name: Output path override
output_path.description: Override the configured export path for this call only.

bookstack_unreachable.title: BookStack ma jistax jintlaħaq
bookstack_unreachable.description: L-integrazzjoni BookStack Sync ma setgħetx tilħaq l-istanza BookStack għal {count} sinkronizzazzjonijiet konsekuttivi. Kawżi komuni: il-container BookStack imwaqqaf, problema fin-netwerk, jew reverse proxy jirrifjuta l-konnessjonijiet. Is-sinkronizzazzjoni li jmiss li tirnexxi tirrisolvi din in-notifika awtomatikament.

page_tampered.title: Il-blokk AUTO ta' paġna ġie editjat manwalment
page_tampered.description: Il-paġna „{page_title}" f'BookStack għandha blokk AUTO li ġie editjat barra minn Home Assistant. L-integrazzjoni qabżet din il-paġna waqt is-sinkronizzazzjoni biex ma tikteb fuq il-bidliet tiegħek. Mexxi n-noti tiegħek fil-blokk MANUAL jew rrevoka l-bidla fil-blokk AUTO biex is-sinkronizzazzjoni li jmiss tkun tista' taġġorna l-paġna mill-ġdid.

bookstack_unreachable.message: Istanza BookStack ma tistax tintlaħaq (ara l-log ta' Home Assistant għad-dettalji).

bookstack_auth_failed.message: BookStack irrifjuta t-token API. Iġġedded it-token f'BookStack u uża l-fluss Reauth.

export_disabled.message: Markdown export is disabled. Enable it in the integration's options under 'Enable Markdown back-export' before calling this service.
